compiled_state.title: Update reviewer-base.md schema example and amend extra-key prohibition for escalate_review
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md:
1. Update the JSON schema example to show escalate_review as an optional field with example
2. CRITICAL: Amend the existing 'Do NOT add any other key' prohibition paragraph. The current text says reviewer agents must not add extra keys. This must be updated to allow escalate_review specifically. Change to: 'Do NOT add any other key except escalate_review (see below) — the validator will reject unrecognized keys.'
3. Add guidance section: 'Include escalate_review only when uncertain about specific findings. Omit entirely when confident about all severity assignments.'
4. Update the fragile severity in the schema example (from story 53d5-76e4 — ensure fragile is listed as valid)

Unit test exemption: Prompt/guidance file with no conditional logic.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Schema example contains escalate_review
  Verify: grep -q 'escalate_review' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md
- [ ] Extra-key prohibition amended to allow escalate_review
  Verify: grep -q 'except escalate_review' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: GREEN testing mode — no tests needed ✓
